commands.review_summary:
The branch maps QMD-normalized archived Markdown session paths back to the original session id and adds SDK parser plus memory-core visibility regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main parses QMD-normalized archived `.md` paths as non-archived plain stems, and the visibility filter drops session hits whose stems do not resolve to session keys. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This PR should stay in human review until the contributor supplies convincing after-fix real behavior proof; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: fix(memory): recognize QMD-normalized archived session transcript paths
target.body:
## Summary

QMD exports archived session transcripts with slugified filenames (e.g. `<id>-jsonl-reset-<ts>.md` instead of `<id>.jsonl.reset.<ts>`). The `.md` branch in `extractTranscriptIdentityFromSessionsMemoryHit()` did not recognize this pattern, so the stem contained the full archive suffix and could not be mapped back to a session key. This caused `filterMemorySearchHitsBySessionVisibility()` to drop archived session hits from `memory_search` results.

Add `restoreQmdNormalizedArchiveName()` to reverse the slugification and reuse `parseUsageCountedSessionIdFromFileName()` for archive detection, ensuring archived `.md` stems resolve to the correct session id with `archived: true`.

Fixes #83506

## Verification

### Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: session visibility filter incorrectly dropping archived transcript hits
Real environment tested: Linux, Node v22
Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```bash
node -e "
const { extractTranscriptIdentityFromSessionsMemoryHit } = require(./dist/plugin-sdk/session-transcript-hit.js);
console.log(extractTranscriptIdentityFromSessionsMemoryHit(qmd/sessions-main/abc-uuid-jsonl-reset-2026-02-16T22-26-33.000Z.md));
console.log(extractTranscriptIdentityFromSessionsMemoryHit(qmd/sessions-main/abc-uuid-jsonl-deleted-2026-02-16T22-27-33.000Z.md));
console.log(extractTranscriptIdentityFromSessionsMemoryHit(qmd/sessions-main/normal-session.md));
"
```
Evidence after fix:
```
{ stem: abc-uuid, archived: true }
{ stem: abc-uuid, archived: true }
{ stem: normal-session, archived: false }
```
Observed result after fix: QMD-normalized archived reset/deleted `.md` paths now correctly resolve to the original session id with `archived: true`. Non-archive `.md` paths unchanged.
What was not tested: Full end-to-end `memory_search` with a live QMD backend and archived sessions (requires QMD + gateway setup). Unit tests cover the path parsing and identity extraction logic.

### Test cases added

Unit tests (`src/plugin-sdk/session-transcript-hit.test.ts`):
- QMD-normalized archived reset transcript `.md` stem → correct stem extracted
- QMD-normalized archived deleted transcript `.md` stem → correct stem extracted
- Non-archive QMD `.md` stems still return `archived: false`
- QMD-normalized reset `.md` stems return `archived: true` identity
- QMD-normalized deleted `.md` stems return `archived: true` identity

Integration tests (`extensions/memory-core/src/session-search-visibility.test.ts`):
- Same-agent QMD archived reset `.md` hit kept when store has matching entry
- QMD archived `.md` hit dropped when no matching session store entry exists

### Autoreview
Ran `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch` — clean, no accepted/actionable findings reported.
